arts.ttl: Spurs' Starting 11 From 2008 When They Last Won a Trophy - Where Are They Now?
arts.sum: The likes of Dimitar Berbatov and Robbie Keane were among the last to win a trophy with Tottenham

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min to miss out on Tottenham record as Ange Postecoglou confirms Europa League injury blow
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur captain Son Heung-min will miss out on breaking a club record set by Harry Kane as Ange Postecoglou confirms a new injury blow.

arts.ttl: Team News: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: ‘I couldn’t care less’: Postecoglou bats away speculation before Frankfurt trip
arts.sum: Manager pledges to fight ‘tooth and nail’ for victory Van de Ven says players ‘still have trust in the gaffer’ Ange Postecoglou has said that Tottenham will fight “tooth and nail” to salvage their season by reaching the Europa League semi-finals and admitted he “couldn’t care less” about speculation over his future. Spurs will be without Son Heung-min for the second leg of their quarter-final against Eintracht Frankfurt tonight due to a foot injury. Postecoglou admitted that it was a blow to lose his captain as his side prepares for their most important game of the season after a 17th Premier League defeat of the campaign against Wolves on Sunday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou ignores blow to come out fighting over Spurs future - 'I couldn't care less'
arts.sum: EINTRACHT FRANKFURT vs TOTTENHAM: Spurs boss Ange Postecoglou could be faced with the sack if his side fail to qualify for the Europa League semi-finals on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer MAJOR injury blow ahead of Europa League clash as Son Heung-min stays at home for Frankfurt second leg
arts.sum: Tottenham have been dealt a blow to their hopes of reaching the Europa League semi-finals ahead of their game away at Eintracht Frankfurt with Son Heung-min not travelling.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Son injury, his Tottenham future and Romero's big response
arts.sum: What’s important is we have a game tomorrow night that’s a massive opportunity for this group of players, for us as a team, for this football club to get to closer to achieving what everyone wants to achieve. I don’t think it is about salvaging anything and you know these opportunities don’t come round very often even if you’re having a good season, so why not take it?

arts.ttl: Van de Ven: Spurs want to win UEL for Ange
arts.sum: Micky van de Ven has said Tottenham Hotspur players want to win the Europa League for under-fire manager Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Son Heung Min ruled out of Europa League quarter-final in Tottenham injury blow
arts.sum: A foot injury rules the Spurs captain out of the second leg against Eintracht Frankfurt

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars talk about winning the Europa League EVERY day as Ange's man bins football's biggest cliche
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's last hope of lifting silverware this season rests on Thursday's quarter-final clash with Eintracht Frankfurt
